title: Build YouTube video clipping application

requirements.text: Create a form where users can input a YouTube video URL

quotes: Make a app where I can clip YouTube videos

acceptanceCriteria: Form accepts YouTube video URLs
Form validates URL format before submission
User receives feedback on invalid URLs

requirements.text: Display the YouTube video in an embedded player after URL submission

quotes: Make a app where I can clip YouTube videos

acceptanceCriteria: Video player loads and displays the submitted YouTube video
Player shows video controls for playback

requirements.text: Implement clip selection controls allowing users to set start and end timestamps for a video segment

quotes: Make a app where I can clip YouTube videos

acceptanceCriteria: Users can specify start time in minutes and seconds
Users can specify end time in minutes and seconds
System validates that end time is after start time
Preview shows the selected time range

requirements.text: Store clip metadata including video URL, start timestamp, end timestamp, and creation date in the backend

quotes: Make a app where I can clip YouTube videos

acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts and stores clip data
Each clip has a unique identifier
Clips persist across sessions

requirements.text: Display a list of all saved clips with thumbnail, title, and time range

quotes: Make a app where I can clip YouTube videos

acceptanceCriteria: Backend returns all stored clips
Frontend displays clips in a list or grid format
Each clip shows the video title and time range
Clicking a clip loads it in the player

requirements.text: Allow users to delete saved clips

quotes: Make a app where I can clip YouTube videos

acceptanceCriteria: Each clip has a delete button
Backend removes clip when delete is requested
UI updates to reflect deletion

requirements.text: Design a creative, coherent visual theme with distinct style for the video clipping application interface, ensuring consistent application of colors, typography, and layout patterns throughout all screens
acceptanceCriteria: Application has a cohesive visual identity
Color scheme is applied consistently
Typography choices support readability and hierarchy
Layout patterns are consistent across all views

nonGoals: Video editing capabilities beyond timestamp selection
